channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Mach–Zehnder carbon monoxide gas sensor based on tin dioxide coated endlessly single-mode photonic crystal fiber
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0202

item.title: A class of extended high-dimensional nonisospectral KdV hierarchies and symmetry
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0223

item.title: A review on extended special and general theory of relativity for superluminal particles and their cosmological applications
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0171

item.title: Outlining the impact of electro-osmotic force and mixed convection flow of EMHD nanofluid flow on the stretched cylinder: a computational layout
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0194

item.title: A first-principles investigation of XZn2Si2 (X = Ca, Sr, Ba) Zintl compounds: structural, elastic, electrical, optical and thermoelectric properties
item.description: Article by Kashif Zaman, Abbas Khan, Muhammad Ismail, Khamael M. Abualnaja, Aijaz Rasool Chaudhry DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0168
